form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; won by 1.0 len at Turffontein Standside February 21 over 1160m defeating Highwayman Harry carrying 57.5kg at $2.30. Impressive debut win as favourite. Can make it two-for-two.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8.5). Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; won by 1.0 len at Turffontein Standside February 21 over 1160m defeating Highwayman Harry carrying 57.5kg at $2.30. Impressive debut win as favourite. Can make it two-for-two.

form.formComment: Comes off a 34 day let-up. At the latest run second last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on March 8 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Boom Boom with 57.5kg at $4.50. The start before that 3rd of 12 at Scottsville on February 15 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Grand Occasion with 55kg at $26. Better than last run. Has a low draw and is in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Comes off a 34 day let-up. At the latest run second last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on March 8 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Boom Boom with 57.5kg at $4.50. The start before that 3rd of 12 at Scottsville on February 15 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Grand Occasion with 55kg at $26. Better than last run. Has a low draw and is in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, carried out by Sovereign Gem and brushed Echo.
Lost 1 length at the start. Raced green.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Freshened for 52 days. First-up 2nd of 10 at this track on January 18 over 1400m, neck behind Happy Fortune carrying 51.0kg at $13.50. Last start won by a neck at Scottsville February 18 over 1400m defeating Phutulicious with 58.5kg at $21. Racing well. Top prospects again with leading rider going aboard.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Freshened for 52 days. First-up 2nd of 10 at this track on January 18 over 1400m, neck behind Happy Fortune carrying 51.0kg at $13.50. Last start won by a neck at Scottsville February 18 over 1400m defeating Phutulicious with 58.5kg at $21. Racing well. Top prospects again with leading rider going aboard.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months second last of 10 at Scottsville on March 15 over 1400m, 10 len behind Past Is Prologue carrying 61kg at $41. Previously second-up second last of 11 at this track on September 26 over 1400m, 9 len behind Infinity Edge with 53kg at $26. Needs more time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Second run back. First-up after five months second last of 10 at Scottsville on March 15 over 1400m, 10 len behind Past Is Prologue carrying 61kg at $41. Previously second-up second last of 11 at this track on September 26 over 1400m, 9 len behind Infinity Edge with 53kg at $26. Needs more time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 350m, rolled in marginally. Hung in from the 250m.
Commenced to hang in from the 250m.
Jumped awkwardly leaving the stalls and thereafter slow into stride.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 10 at Scottsville on March 15 over 1400m, 3 len behind Past Is Prologue carrying 55.5kg at $26. The start before that second last of 10 at this track on January 18 over 1400m, 9 len behind Happy Fortune carrying 57kg at $34. Likely to play a big role.

The start before that second last of 10 at this track on January 18 over 1400m, 9 len behind Happy Fortune carrying 57kg at $34. Likely to play a big role.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 41-day let-up. First-up after three months ran last of 8 at Scottsville on March 1 over 1200m, 11 len behind Queen Braganza carrying 58kg at $15. Previously second-up ran last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on November 16 over 1400m, 7 len behind Spinmyangelsspin carrying 57.5kg at $4.50. Must improve significantly.

Previously second-up ran last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on November 16 over 1400m, 7 len behind Spinmyangelsspin carrying 57.5kg at $4.50. Must improve significantly.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Kicked the back gates as the start was effected and lost 2 lengths.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd in a small field at Vaal on April 2 over 1450m, 3 len behind Golden Operator carrying 57kg at $11. The start before that second last of 9 at Turffontein Standside on February 21 over 1600m, 7 len behind Scarlett Heart carrying 55.5kg at $4.50. Trip suits and overdue for another win. Go close after a solid performance last time out.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months second last of 8 at Greyville All Weather on April 3 over 1000m, 6 len behind Catch A Penny carrying 56.5kg at $11. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at this track on May 10 over 1000m, 6 len behind Position Of Power with 57.5kg at $4.50. Needs to do a lot more.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months ran last of 9 at Turffontein Inside on March 12 over 1800m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Falconfly with 58kg at $34. Previously second-up 2nd of 16 at Vaal on April 17 over 1200m, neck behind Red Amber with 60kg at $21. Needs to lift.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Second run back. First-up after six months ran last of 9 at Turffontein Inside on March 12 over 1800m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Falconfly with 58kg at $34. Previously second-up 2nd of 16 at Vaal on April 17 over 1200m, neck behind Red Amber with 60kg at $21. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin, losing one length. Over-raced in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 2nd of 9 at Greyville All Weather on March 27 over 1400m, 0.8 len behind Hearts On Fire with 58.7kg at $5. The race before that won by 0.6 len at Greyville All Weather March 8 over 1400m defeating Vaans Spirit carrying 59.1kg at $6. Good job last start and has top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together and brushed Oklahoma Girl in the concluding stages.
